task_completion.description: Open the route properties or route editing window in Garmin BaseCamp
task_completion.visual_evidence: A route properties dialog box or route editing pane is open in Garmin BaseCamp showing a list of waypoints.

task_completion.description: Insert the 'Invasive Knotweed Patch' waypoint into the correct position in the route
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route properties list shows 'Invasive Knotweed Patch' positioned exactly between 'Intersection 2' and 'Intersection 3'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Ranger Station' waypoint to the end of the route
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route properties list shows 'Ranger Station' as the very last waypoint in the route sequence.

task_completion.description: Rename the route to 'Fells Modified Survey'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route name field in the properties dialog or the BaseCamp sidebar list displays 'Fells Modified Survey'.

task_completion.description: Export the modified route as a GPX file to the specified output directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog in BaseCamp showing the file being saved as 'modified_survey.gpx' in 'C:\workspace\output\', or a File Explorer window showing the exported file at that exact location.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to modify the route
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp's interface (route properties, map view) rather than a text editor or IDE modifying XML/GPX data directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality to create the final file
integrity.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp 'Export' dialog is visible, rather than a terminal window using commands (like echo or Out-File) to generate the GPX file.

integrity.description: The agent did not write a script to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal, PowerShell, or IDE windows are shown executing scripts to parse, modify, or generate the GPX file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: C:\workspace\output\modified_survey.gpx. Expected route name: 'Fells Modified Survey'. Expected waypoint sequence: 'Trailhead', 'Intersection 1', 'Intersection 2', 'Invasive Knotweed Patch', 'Intersection 3', 'Ranger Station'.
